_publications._publicationTitle: Activity of Selumetinib in Neurofibromatosis Type 1-Related Plexiform Neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: It is of interest that in the mouse model, intermittent dosing was efficacious, even though target inhibition of MEK in tumor tissue was modest and transient
details: Intermittent dosing was efficacious despite modest and transient target inhibition of MEK in tumor tissue
